seoTitle: Roughit vs Round Swamp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Roughit and Round Swamp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Roughit vs Round Swamp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Roughit and Round Swamp.
heading: Roughit vs Round Swamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Roughit, New South Wales and Round Swamp, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Round Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Roughit (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Roughit or Round Swamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Roughit has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Round Swamp scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Roughit scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Round Swamp scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Roughit or Round Swamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Round Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
